name: getWebpage
description: Fetch a webpage and extract its readable text. Returns raw text for short pages or an AI summary for long pages. Always fetch fresh — never use page content from previous calls. If a previous fetch failed, retry with the same URL. The optional 'prompt' parameter biases the summary without overriding facts.
policyHint: When the user provides a specific URL or when search results need deeper reading from a source, fetch the page directly. Do not summarize page content from memory.

prompt.description: OPTIONAL: extra system instructions to bias the summary (e.g., 'focus on statements by user X'). Used only in summary mode; ignored in dump mode.

userPrompt.description: User question or instruction to execute against the page text (required — this is the main task).
